73542.subject: Well Informed: You probably don’t need extra electrolytes
73542.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODZ9AAcAAAAAAcoxXBWL0zcC8DoEmUZYIN1lfGsxEzTnPdBXZmrNn_PSc_mfxLfQtyE94uW_vAmVIRvMtd5OI3lllbGpOiy1MU_5j170R6naLh7SkGMPVe0 

May 24th 2026

 

 
 
 

 Well Informed
 


 Your evidence-based guide to health and wellness
 


 
 
 









 We hope you enjoy Well Informed, our weekly newsletter that assesses the scientific evidence behind the health and wellness trends that fill your feed. Not for you? You can 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODZ9AAcAAAAAAcoxXBWMmiszME1GfXk3Lcpxze1Lsv54i0CTAkHx-14qLnnBO3uBNnjk1tpthSNG5AJoAIT4DD75CR6QfQpJaUJ0gaEqY0DLk-7oOq7OdvQ 
unsubscribe  at any time.

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODZ9AAcAAAAAAcoxXBWO8LjbEaAQu-T9z1v4SsPBuSQbuLu4SRtZ2CZb7B3b6KZeB0al1fjRA5-fzBoYE514MuMHbc-rOWsGJlGqPX-GZxt4V1GkjlENLt0 


You probably don’t need extra electrolytes


 Tim Cross

Senior science writer


 Hello. With a bank-holiday weekend looming, Britain is gearing up for what passes for a heatwave up in the north Atlantic. Temperatures might hit 300C on Sunday. That’s good for barbecues, beers and catching some rays. But anyone hoping to use the long weekend for a long run or a big outing on the bike
